microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end delivery** of Azure's enterprise resilience program, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and shifted execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Served as **bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation deployment tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating across engineering, clinical, and customer-facing teams to resolve dependencies before they became blockers.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program, delivering in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new deployment validation playbook for enterprise customers.
Built an internal AI agent to automate drill planning workflows, **cutting planning cycle time by 39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount to the core engineering team.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows by leading customer-facing demos and training sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly.

Facilitated 11+ discovery interviews with enterprise engineering teams to surface critical integration gaps, directly **influencing roadmap prioritization** to include intent-based YAML generation as a core platform capability.

Improved solution delivery speed by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** system with rigorous metadata standards, reducing lookup time by 83% across distributed engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ engineering teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating $3M in revenue impact.
Ran structured discovery with 20+ service teams to map 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a **deployment automation roadmap** targeting the highest-risk integration paths.

Engineered a Power BI dashboard to surface operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership **real-time visibility** into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of enterprise deployment bottlenecks.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **end-to-end migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit legacy OS transition, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime throughout the pilot deployment.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration pattern for future rollouts.
Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving **40+ high-priority integration tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to unblock downstream deployment milestones.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by designing and owning the end-to-end scoping, requirements, and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a structured CRM deployment.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing web presence and search profiles to improve conversion by 2.7% with no increase in spend.

Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering pricing model recommendations that improved leadership's ability to scope and prioritize high-value work.
